arts.ttl: Milan prepare for Supercoppa derby against Inter: Leao’s fitness and tactical options in focus
arts.sum: Milan are ramping up preparations for the highly anticipated Supercoppa Italiana derby against Inter, with coach Sergio Conceição facing crucial decisions regarding his lineup. The big question mark remains around Rafael Leao's fitness, as the talented winger has been recovering from an injury. arts.ttl: AC Milan preparing summer move for Samuele Ricci
arts.sum: AC Milan are strategically planning for the future as they intensify their pursuit of Samuele Ricci, the talented midfielder currently with Torino. Following a recent contract extension that ties Ricci to the Granata until 2028, it has become clear that a January transfer is off the table. However, Milan are determined to make a strong move for the player in the upcoming summer transfer window. The post AC Milan preparing summer move for Samuele Ricci appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: SuperCoppa Italiana Final: Milan v Inter: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the highly anticipated Derby della Madonnina approaches, Inter Milan and AC Milan are set to clash in the Supercoppa Italiana on Monday. This match not only carries the weight of local rivalry but also the significance of silverware, with Inter aiming for their fourth consecutive title and Milan looking to equal their rivals with eight Supercoppa wins. The post SuperCoppa Italiana Final: Milan v Inter: Match Preview appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Milan’s Loftus-Cheek returns to group Training: Set to Feature Against Inter
arts.sum: In a positive development for AC Milan and new manager Sergio Conceicao, Ruben Loftus-Cheek has resumed group training following his injury layoff. The English midfielder joined his teammates who did not participate in the Supercoppa Italiana semi-final victory over Juventus.
